Bash(source /home/storage/Cloude/venv/bin/activate && python manage.py shell -c "
from django.test import Client
from django.contrib.auth.models import User
from io import BytesIO
import os

user = User.objects.filter\(username='aborowczak'\).first\(\)
client = Client\(\)
client.force_login\(user\)

test_file = BytesIO\(b'Hello World Test!'\)
test_file.name = 'test_upload_fix.txt'

response = client.post\('/storage/upload/', {'file': test_file, 'name': 'test_upload_fix.txt'}\)
print\(f'Status: {response.status_code}'\)
print\(f'Response: {response.content.decode\(\)}'\)
")

from core.models import StorageFile

from core.models import StorageFolder

Bash(source /home/storage/Cloude/venv/bin/activate && python manage.py shell -c "
from django.contrib.auth.models import User
from accounts.models import UserProfile

for user in User.objects.exclude\(username='AnonymousUser'\):
    try:
        profile = user.profile
        used = profile.get_storage_used\(\)
        quota = profile.storage_quota
        print\(f'{user.username}: {used/\(1024**3\):.2f}GB benutzt von {quota/\(1024**3\):.0f}GB Quota \({profile.get_storage_used_percentage\(\):.1f}%\)'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'{user.username}: Kein Profil - {e}'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "objects imported")
